summary: Phase 4 testing complete - NFE emission, Industry PCP, Shoes Grid, AI Copilot modules. All 17 backend API tests passed. All 6 frontend pages tested successfully with full integration.

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on form inputs (tenant slug, email, password, continue button, login button)

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to login form inputs for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: All NFE endpoints working with snake_case JSON - documents emitted with authorized status
Industry PCP module returns proper snake_case fields (product_name, planned_qty, etc)
Shoes module returns grids with snake_case fields and commissions working
AI Copilot using Gemini 3 Flash via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - responds with relevant business suggestions
Frontend pages properly fetch data from API with auth token in sessionStorage
Sidebar has all required links: Emissao NF-e, Co-Piloto IA, Industria, Calcados

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login, Industry, Shoes, NFE, Copilot pages all working with proper API integration

seed_data.industry_materials: 7 materials tracked (base, espuma, mdf, parafuso, tecido, tubo, verniz)

tested_features.3_nfe_emit: PASS - POST /api/v1/nfe/emit creates doc with status=authorized
tested_features.16_frontend_login: PASS - Login page loads with 2-step form, authenticates successfully
tested_features.17_frontend_industry: PASS - Industry page shows orders, BOMs, materials from API
tested_features.18_frontend_shoes: PASS - Shoes page shows grids and commissions from API
tested_features.19_frontend_nfe: PASS - NFE page shows documents, emission form works
tested_features.20_frontend_copilot: PASS - Copilot page has chat interface, AI responds
tested_features.21_sidebar_links: PASS - Sidebar has 'Emissao NF-e' and 'Co-Piloto IA' links

mocked_apis.sefaz_scraping: SEFAZ web scraping is MOCKED (external access unavailable)
mocked_apis.whatsapp_verification: WhatsApp verification generates wa.me links only - MOCKED
mocked_apis.persistence: All data is IN-MEMORY (no database persistence)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 complete. All NFE, Industry PCP, Shoes Grid, and AI Copilot features working. Backend uses Go binary on 8002, proxied through Python FastAPI on 8001. Frontend on 3000 via Nginx on 80. All APIs return snake_case JSON. Auth uses sessionStorage for access_token. Login page has 2-step flow (tenant slug -> credentials).
